hero.kicker: Think better. Communicate better. Lead & create better.
hero.title: Build the skills that change a life.
hero.lead: Atmart builds your critical thinking, your communication, your ability to lead and create, and your command of data and AI — for free.
hero.search_ph: Search a tutorial (e.g. critical thinking, Excel, AI…)
jrn.title: A clear path, from beginner to a profession
jrn.sub: Three levels of 100% free tutorials. Then a specialization to become a sought-after professional.
jrn.lvl1_desc: Critical thinking, problem solving, decision making, Excel, data and AI foundations.
jrn.lvl2_desc: Communication, public speaking, professional writing and data storytelling.
jrn.lvl3_desc: Leadership and creation — bringing ideas to life in art, music, coding, agriculture, the trades and enterprise: project management, automation and data-driven decisions.
jrn.spec_desc: The 3 levels are free. Then a paid program leads you to a profession: Data Analyst, Data Scientist, Data Engineer, Business Intelligence, Entrepreneur, Leader & Creator.
pod.title: 🎙 Lojik360 — the Atmart podcast
pod.desc: Every week: a real topic, a clear explanation, to think and decide better. Each episode has its tutorial and its dataset.
data.title: 🗂 And to practice: the Datasets shop
data.desc: Datasets you won't find anywhere else — economy, geography, social, finance. Some are free, forever.
tools.title: 🧰 The tools of the trade, explained simply
tools.desc: Power BI, Python, R, MySQL, GitHub… where to download them officially, how to install them, and where to start.
nl.title: 📬 Stay connected
nl.desc: Every week, get the new episode, a tutorial and a free dataset. Zero spam.
foot.tagline: Technology & data marketplace — think, communicate, lead and create.
foot.bottom: © 2026 Atmart LLC — Technology & Data Marketplace. Lojik360 is a brand of Atmart LLC.
for.title: Atmart specializations
for.lead: The 3 levels of tutorials are free (Think, Communicate, Lead). Once you have the foundation, choose a paid specialization — with real projects, mentoring and a certificate — to become a sought-after data professional.
for.path_desc: Everyone starts with the free tutorials: Think better → Communicate better → Lead better. There you build the core skills and discover which profession attracts you.
for.choose_sub: Six paid tracks toward a specific profession. Pre-registration is open — you'll be notified at launch, with a launch price reserved for the first to enroll.
for.t1_tag: Become the person who reasons with method and decides well.
for.t2_tag: The most in-demand profession — in companies and as a freelancer.
for.t3_tag: Predict, model and automate with code.
for.t4_tag: Build the systems that make data run.
for.t5_tag: Turn data into decisions for leaders.
for.t6_tag: Launch your business and lead with data.
for.why_desc: Demand for AI and data skills is exploding (+245% in Africa in 2025; 230 million jobs will require digital skills in sub-Saharan Africa by 2030). But almost all training is in English and uses foreign examples. Atmart trains in our languages, with our data, at accessible prices — and the tutorials stay free for everyone.
for.org_desc: NGOs, institutions, companies: tailored workshops in person or online — data literacy, Power BI, decision-making with AI. Request a quote.
pc.kicker: A real topic. Real data. A clear explanation.
pc.title: The Lojik360 podcast
pc.lead: Every week, we take a topic that matters to Haiti, the Caribbean or Francophone Africa and explain it with data and logic. Audio in French and Haitian Creole, subtitles in English and Spanish.
pc.eps_sub: Season 1 — "Thinking with data" (launch examples; replace with your real episodes)
pc.e4_title: Solar energy in numbers: is it worth it?
pc.e4_desc: Engineer's analysis: how much a solar system really costs, in Haiti and in Dakar, and after how many years it pays off.
pc.e3_title: AI and our jobs, without panic
pc.e3_desc: What the data really says about AI and jobs in our economies — and the skills on the rise (245% more demand in Africa in 2025).
pc.e2_desc: The scientific method applied to everyday decisions: health, money, information.
pc.e1_desc: The 5 most common statistical manipulations in the media and on social networks — and how to spot them in seconds.
pc.eco_desc: 🎙 The episode explains the topic → 📚 the tutorial teaches you to do it yourself → 🗂 the dataset lets you practice → 🎓 the program takes you to the professional level.
k.title: Atmart Junior — learning made fun.
k.lead: Free, fun activities for kids: make things with your hands, think for yourself, explore the digital world and understand money.
k.parents: : simple, safe activities that work without a screen.
k.cta_desc: New free activities to learn, create and grow.
k.c1_desc: Bring your ideas to life: drawing, music, little games to code, gardening, building.
k.c1_a1: Draw your imaginary animal and invent its story.
k.c1_a2: Build a musical instrument from things around the house.
k.c1_a3: Plant a seed and note what changes each day.
k.c2_desc: Ask good questions, tell true from false, don't believe everything.
k.c2_a1: Before sharing news, ask: 'how do we know?'
k.c2_a2: Find three reasons for and three against an idea.
k.c2_a3: Spot an advert and say what it wants you to do.
k.c3_desc: Use a computer safely, find good information, read a simple chart.
k.c3_a1: Count how many friends like each ice-cream flavour, then make a little chart.
k.c3_a2: Find who wrote a web page before believing it.
k.c3_a3: Sort your toys into groups — that's organising data!
k.c4_desc: Saving, making a small budget, solving everyday problems.
k.c4_a1: Save one coin a day and count at the end of the week.
k.c4_a2: Make the shopping list and guess the total before paying.
k.c4_a3: Choose between two wishes: which one lasts longer?
atm.title: The marketplace for art, technology, data and AI.
atm.lead: Atmart designs and sells concrete solutions: an app for facilitators, rare and documented data, software and professional guides. Free education lives on Lojik360.
atm.studio_title: Lojik360 Studio — your training session, generated in minutes
atm.studio_desc: An app for facilitators, teachers and NGOs: describe your group (“25 youths, 90 minutes, Creole, rural area”) and walk out with the full session — facilitation plan, exercises, quizzes and printable sheets. Personalized for every group, AI-powered, by subscription.
atm.studio_b1: Session plans adapted to the audience, time and language (Creole, French, English, Spanish)
atm.studio_b2: Exercises, quizzes and printable sheets generated for each group
atm.studio_b3: Coming next: school & NGO accounts, results tracking, reports
atm.data_title: 🗂 Datasets — data you won't find anywhere else
atm.data_desc: Economy, geography, social, finance — cleaned, documented, analysis-ready. Some free, forever.
atm.saas_desc: Applications that solve one precise problem, built with the field.
atm.saas1_desc: The surveyors' app: field files, measurements, reports and client tracking — designed for Haiti and the Caribbean. Three pilot firms.
atm.saas2_desc: A slow process, scattered data, a trade without a tool? Describe it — we build the solutions the market actually needs.
atm.guides_desc: Ready-to-use manuals for training and facilitating — the paid companion to the free tutorials.
atm.guide1_desc: The complete manual for teaching critical thinking: 90-min and 6-session plans, activities, discussion scripts, answer keys, assessment rubric, certificate. Organization license — $49.
atm.guide2_title: Management & career in the age of AI — facilitator edition
atm.guide2_desc: The workshop version of the guide: 15 themes, group exercises and a facilitated SWOT matrix. Read the free version on Lojik360 meanwhile.
atm.learn_desc: Tutorials, podcast and Lojikkid — Atmart's free education lives on Lojik360. Learn first; when you're ready to train others, the Guide and the Studio await you here.
atm.nl_desc: Be the first to know about the Studio launch, new datasets and new products. Zero spam.
atm.foot_tagline: Technology, data & AI marketplace — useful solutions.
studio.title: Lojik360 Studio
studio.lead: Describe your group and receive a complete training session: minute-by-minute facilitation plan, exercises, quiz with answer key and a printable participant handout — in Creole, French, English or Spanish.
studio.beta_note: Beta — “Critical Thinking” module. 1 free trial session per day; unlimited with a license.
studio.f_focus_1: Discovery session — module 1 (Pause before you believe)
studio.f_focus_2: Module 2 — Spot the trick in an argument
studio.f_focus_4: Module 4 — Bias and how to beat it
studio.f_focus_5: Module 5 — From problems to clear decisions
studio.f_focus_6: Module 6 — Make it a daily habit
studio.f_focus_all: Full journey — all 6 modules in one session
studio.f_notes_ph: E.g.: group already did module 1; many market vendors; plan a break…
studio.f_lic_help: Without a key: 1 trial session per day. For a license, write to sales@atmart.ltd — direct purchase coming soon.
studio.placeholder: Your session will appear here. Fill in the form and click “Generate my session” — or look at an example first.
studio.how_1: 1 — Describe your group: audience, size, duration, language, setting.
studio.how_2: 2 — The Studio adapts the Lojik360 curriculum to YOUR group: timed plan, exercises, answer-keyed quiz, printable handout.
studio.how_3: 3 — Review, adjust, print: you are the facilitator — the Studio prepares, you deliver.
studio.how_note: The teaching content comes from the Lojik360 curriculum (the same as the free tutorial and the Facilitator Guide). The Studio doesn't replace your judgment: always review the session before facilitating.
atm.studio_btn2: School / NGO license — write to us

p36.e_lead: Got an interview? Come prepared. The free diagnostic reveals your strengths and your 3 axes; Pro prepares you for the questions YOU will be asked — with answers built on YOUR proof. In Kreyòl, French, English, Spanish. Powered by the SWOT360 method.

p36.e1_l6: 🎤 3 questions they may ask you in the interview — free
k36.title: 🌱 Career360 — your career coach for the AI era
k36.lead: Entèvyou360 wins you the interview; Career360 wins you the career. A coach that remembers your journey, follows you every week in your new job or your growth, and measures your progress — 100% anonymous: your code is your account, erasable anytime.
k36.s_l1: Your personal coach — a session every week, it remembers everything
k36.s_l2: 3 tracks: new job (90 days) · job search · growing in your role
k36.s_l3: Measured progress, proof to show — an M&E method
k36.s_l4: Pushes you toward humans: mentors, network, associations

k36.e_l1: Everything in Solo, for every team member
k36.e_l2: Upskill the team for the AI era: delegate · supervise · strengthen
k36.e_l3: One anonymous code per member — the employer sees nothing individual
k36.e_l4: Ideal for new hires' first 90 days (retention)

at2.kicker: Color, movement, light — art and creativity that let our minds breathe.
at2.bio: ATM — Andrelita T. Myril — is a painter and visual artist, a graduate of ENARTS, Haiti's most renowned National School of Arts. Her mission: put the tools of art in everyone's hands — to grow each person's creativity, give the mind the escape it needs, and nurture human and mental balance. Her canvases — bold colors, moving rhythms, figures and abstractions — are windows onto the light of Haiti and the Caribbean.
at2.mark: Atmart even carries her mark in its name: ATM + art.
at2.note: All works are signed originals. Photos taken in the studio — real colors are slightly brighter. Dimensions and year on request.
at2.com_desc: Portraits, landscapes, pieces for your home, office or event — tell us about your project and ATM will bring it to color.
at2.home_desc: Original works by Andrelita T. Myril (ATM), ENARTS-trained painter — the colors of Haiti and the Caribbean, for your home or office. Price on request.
c36.title: 🚗 Driver360 — pass the Massachusetts road test
c36.lead: Driving school teaches in English and rushes you? Driver360 preps the tests in YOUR language: the examiner's real commands, the traps, your sponsor guided. The Pèmi written test is included, and the 7D certificate has its own coach.
c36.l1: The RMV examiner's real commands, in English + your language
c36.l2: Session Mode: your sponsor scores, the coach corrects instantly
c36.l3: The automatic-fail traps: before driving · on the road · the way back
c36.l5: Printable sponsor guide · Kreyòl, Spanish, French, English
c36.open: I already have a code → open my coach
c36.l6: NEW: Pèmi written test included — 20 practice questions with explanations
c36.d_l1: Preparation for the Massachusetts 7D certificate written exam
c36.d_l2: Built on the official RMV manual (2026 ed.) — exact numbers
c36.d_l3: The coach explains in your language and drills you question by question
c36.d_l4: The classic traps: 8 pupils max, post-trip, renewal…
c36.d_open: I already have a code → open my 7D coach
c36.emp: 🚌 Transport companies — school, delivery, senior transport, MART: recruit from the pool — employer portal (free founder codes).
c36.lic_t: 🪪 Already hold your Class D, 7D or CDL license?
c36.lic_d: Join the driver pool for free: school transport, package delivery, senior transport, regional transit (MART) — Massachusetts employers contact you. Your contact stays hidden until an employer selects you.

hero.cta1: 🧭 Entèvyou360 — get ready for your job interview
ds.kicker: Clean, documented data, ready for analysis.
ds.title: The Datasets store
ds.lead: Datasets you won't find anywhere else: Haiti, the French-speaking Caribbean and Africa — collected, cleaned and documented (variable dictionary + sources). CSV, Excel and Power BI (.pbix) formats.
ds.c1_p: The full Lojik360 University module: 6 modules (foundations, arguments, evidence, bias, problem-solving, practice) with exercises, a capstone, a grading rubric and reflection prompts. In French, Creole, English and Spanish (4 Word files).
ds.c1_meta: 📘 Teaching guide • ideal for trainers, schools & workshops • preview: the free tutorial
ds.c2_p: Remittances received in USD and as a % of GDP: Haiti, Dominican Republic, Jamaica, Senegal, Côte d'Ivoire, Mali, Cameroon, Togo. Real, documented data. Source: World Bank.
ds.c3_p: GDP, inflation, gourde/USD exchange rate (monthly), imports/exports, 2000–2025. Cleaned and harmonised.
ds.c4_h: Haiti Geo Pack — every GPS coordinate NEW
ds.c4_p: 570 communal sections + 140 county towns + 10,945 populated places, with names in French AND Kreyòl, official OCHA p-codes, areas and WGS84 coordinates. GeoJSON for departments, communes and sections included for your Power BI/QGIS maps.
ds.c4_meta: 🗺 Geography • Sources: OCHA/CNIGS + GeoNames • free sample (10 rows)
ds.c5_p: Enrolment and literacy rates and spending by department. Ideal for practising dashboards.
ds.c5_meta: 👥 Social • Used in the Excel tutorials
ds.c6_p: Haiti, Guadeloupe, Martinique, French Guiana: age pyramids, migration, urbanisation, 1990–2025.
ds.c7_h: Financial inclusion & mobile money — French-speaking Africa
ds.c7_p: Banking penetration, mobile money adoption and microfinance across 12 countries, 2015–2025.
ds.c7_meta: 📈 Finance • 12 countries • Sources: GSMA, World Bank
ds.c8_p: Every premium dataset, current and future, for 1 year + quarterly updates + priority access.
ds.c8_meta: ⭐ Best value for students and researchers
ds.c9_h: Major cities — Haiti, Caribbean, West Africa
ds.c9_p: 120 cities with population and GPS coordinates. Perfect for your first data map.
ds.c9_meta: 🗺 Geography • Used in the Power BI tutorial
ds.c10_p: Rice, beans, oil, fuel: price readings by market and by month, 2018–2025. Sources: CNSA, FEWS NET.
ds.how_p: Secure payment by card or PayPal through Payhip — instant download. Every dataset comes with its documentation (sources, variable dictionary, usage licence). Students: write to us for a discount. In Haiti, no bank card? Write to us to pay by MonCash: sales@atmart.ltd.
to.kicker: Free or official tools — no pirated versions here.
to.disclaimer: All links point to official sites. Some may become partner (affiliate) links — this never changes the price for you, and we only recommend what we use ourselves.
to.pbi_p: The most in-demand dashboard tool on the job market — and the one we use in our tutorials.
to.pbi_1: Windows only. Install via the Microsoft Store (search for “Power BI Desktop”) — automatic updates.
to.pbi_3: First practice: load our free remittances dataset and build a pays × part_pib_pct histogram.
to.tab_p: The alternative to Power BI, free in its Public edition — your visualisations are published online (perfect for a portfolio).
to.tab_1: Create a free account on public.tableau.com → download Tableau Public (Windows/Mac).
to.tab_3: First practice: rebuild the “Haiti, % of GDP 2000–2024” line chart from the Excel tutorial — and publish it: that's your first portfolio piece.
to.py_p: The number-one language for data and AI. With pandas, 4 lines are enough to analyse a CSV.
to.py_1: Download from python.org → ⚠ tick “Add Python to PATH” during installation.
to.py_2: Install pandas: open a terminal → pip install pandas matplotlib.
to.py_3: Slow connection? Use Google Colab (colab.google): Python in the browser, zero installation.
to.py_4: First practice: import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_csv("transferts_diaspora_2000_2025.csv"); print(df.head())
to.r_p: The reference for statisticians and researchers — widely used for surveys (LAPOP, censuses) and econometrics.
to.r_1: Install R from cran.r-project.org, then RStudio Desktop from posit.co (in that order).
to.r_3: Then: hist(donnees$part_pib_pct) — your first histogram in one line.
to.java_p: The language of large enterprise and Android applications — a solid foundation for software engineering.
to.java_1: Download the free LTS JDK from Adoptium (Eclipse Temurin) — adoptium.net.
to.java_3: First practice: create Bonjou.java with System.out.println("Bonjou Ayiti!"); → javac Bonjou.java → java Bonjou.
to.ev_p: The econometrics software of central banks and ministries — time series, macro forecasting.
to.ev_1: Paid licence — free EViews Student Lite version on eviews.com (email sign-up).
to.ev_2: First practice: import Haiti's remittances series and plot it (Quick → Graph); try a moving average.
to.sas_p: SAS is required in banking, insurance and pharma. The academic cloud edition is free — nothing to install.
to.sas_1: Create a free account on SAS OnDemand for Academics (welcome.oda.sas.com).
to.sas_2: Everything runs in the browser (SAS Studio).
to.sas_3: First practice: import the remittances CSV → proc means data=work.import; var part_pib_pct; run;
to.st_p: The standard for development economists, NGOs and household surveys (World Bank, USAID).
to.st_1: Paid licence on stata.com (reduced student pricing; often provided by universities and NGOs).
to.st_2: First practice: import delimited transferts_diaspora_2000_2025.csv → summarize part_pib_pct if code_iso3=="HTI".
to.st_3: No licence? R does everything Stata does — start with R.
to.sql_p: The most used database on the web. SQL is the second most requested skill for analysts, just after Excel.
to.sql_1: Download MySQL Community Server + MySQL Workbench from dev.mysql.com/downloads.
to.sql_2: During installation, write down your root password carefully.
to.sql_3: First practice: import the remittances CSV (Table Data Import Wizard) then: SELECT pays, MAX(part_pib_pct) FROM transferts GROUP BY pays;
to.git_p: Your living technical CV: every project published on GitHub is proof of skill for recruiters and freelance clients.
to.git_1: Create a free account on github.com.
to.git_3: First practice: create a repo called “my-first-data-project”, add your Excel analysis from the Atmart tutorial and a README explaining your conclusions.
to.vs_p: The universal code editor — Python, R, SQL, web — with thousands of free extensions.
to.vs_3: First practice: open your analyse.py script from the Python tutorial and run it with ▶.
to.co_p: Python + AI in the browser, zero installation — the best option if your computer is modest or your connection limited.
to.co_1: Go to colab.google with a Google account — that's all.
to.co_2: First practice: New notebook → drag the remittances CSV into the files → pd.read_csv(...) → a chart in 3 lines.
to.co_3: Bonus: free GPU for your first AI models.
to.src_lead: The data libraries we use for our tutorials, datasets and episodes — all free, all reliable. Always cite your source!
to.wb_p: GDP, remittances, education, health for 200+ countries — the API behind our diaspora remittances dataset.
to.imf_p: Inflation, exchange rates, public finances — the natural complement to the World Bank.
to.kag_p: Hundreds of thousands of datasets + data science competitions + free notebooks to learn from the best.
to.gds_p: The Google of datasets: search “Haiti remittances” or “Senegal agriculture” and find sources published all over the world.
to.owid_p: Global data (health, energy, poverty) with downloadable charts and open CSVs — perfect for inspiration.
to.un_p: The United Nations statistics portal: population, trade, environment, SDG indicators.
to.hdx_p: OCHA's humanitarian data, very rich on Haiti: administrative boundaries, population, crises — the source of our Geo Pack.
to.lap_p: The major opinion surveys of the Americas (including Haiti): democracy, security, trust in institutions.
to.hd_p: Maps and GIS layers on Haiti (CNIGS): roads, rivers, buildings, hazards — for your geographic analyses.
to.start_p: Our advice: Excel first (already on your machine), then Power BI, then Python on Colab. Follow the tutorials in order — every tool uses the same data, so you progress without starting from scratch.
to.start_cta2: Build a training course with the Studio
